<!-- For community guide contributions, please confirm the checklist below.
     For other changes (scraper, CI, docs), delete it and describe your change. -->

## Community guide

- [ ] New/updated section lives in `community/` (not in generated `docs/` or `bundles/`)
- [ ] Frontmatter has the required `title`, `created`, `updated` (YYYY-MM-DD); `updated` bumped if editing
- [ ] Content is original — not copied verbatim from the official FlashForge wiki
- [ ] `bun run community` passes locally

### What does this guide cover?
